Record Class Money

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Record
com.bank.core.domain.model.Money
Record Components:
amount - the monetary amount, always stored with scale 4
currency - the ISO 4217 currency of this amount
public record Money(BigDecimal amount, Currency currency) extends Record
Immutable value object representing a monetary amount in a specific currency.

All arithmetic operations enforce banker's rounding (RoundingMode.HALF_EVEN) and a fixed scale of 4 decimal places, consistent with the NUMERIC(19,4) column type used in the accounts and transactions tables.

Floating-point types (float, double) are strictly prohibited throughout this codebase; only BigDecimal is used for financial calculations.

Since:
1.0.0
Version:
1.0.0
Author:
Core Banking Team

  • Field Details

    • amount

      private final BigDecimal amount
      The field for the amount record component.

    • currency

      private final Currency currency
      The field for the currency record component.

    • SCALE

      public static final int SCALE
      Scale used for all monetary values (4 decimal places).
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • ROUNDING_MODE

      public static final RoundingMode ROUNDING_MODE
      Rounding mode applied to all fractional calculations (banker's rounding).

  • Constructor Details

    • Money

      public Money(BigDecimal amount, Currency currency)
      Canonical constructor. Normalizes the amount to the standard SCALE and ROUNDING_MODE and validates that the amount is non-negative.
      Parameters:
      amount - the raw monetary amount
      currency - the ISO 4217 currency
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if amount is negative
      NullPointerException - if either argument is null

  • Method Details

    • of

      public static Money of(BigDecimal amount, String currencyCode)
      Factory method that creates a Money instance from a BigDecimal and an ISO 4217 currency code string.
      Parameters:
      amount - the monetary amount
      currencyCode - the ISO 4217 currency code (e.g., "USD")
      Returns:
      a new Money instance
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the currency code is unknown or the amount is negative

    • of

      public static Money of(String amount, String currencyCode)
      Factory method that creates a Money instance from a plain String representation of the amount and an ISO 4217 currency code string.
      Parameters:
      amount - the monetary amount as a string (e.g., "100.50")
      currencyCode - the ISO 4217 currency code
      Returns:
      a new Money instance

    • add

      public Money add(Money other)
      Returns a new Money instance representing the sum of this amount and other.
      Parameters:
      other - the addend; must share the same currency
      Returns:
      the sum as a new Money value object
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if currencies differ

    • subtract

      public Money subtract(Money other)
      Returns a new Money instance representing the difference between this amount and other.
      Parameters:
      other - the subtrahend; must share the same currency
      Returns:
      the difference as a new Money value object
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if currencies differ or the result would be negative

    • isGreaterThanOrEqualTo

      public boolean isGreaterThanOrEqualTo(Money other)
      Returns true if this amount is greater than or equal to other.
      Parameters:
      other - the comparand; must share the same currency
      Returns:
      true if this >= other
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if currencies differ

    • isZero

      public boolean isZero()
      Returns true if this amount equals zero.
      Returns:
      true if the amount is zero

    • assertSameCurrency

      private void assertSameCurrency(Money other)
      Validates that other has the same currency as this instance.
      Parameters:
      other - the money to compare currencies with
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if currencies differ

    • toString

      public String toString()
      Returns a human-readable representation in the form "100.0000 USD".
      Specified by:
      toString in class Record
      Returns:
      string representation of this monetary value

    • hashCode

      public final int hashCode()
      Returns a hash code value for this object. The value is derived from the hash code of each of the record components.
      Specified by:
      hashCode in class Record
      Returns:
      a hash code value for this object

    • equals

      public final boolean equals(Object o)
      Indicates whether some other object is "equal to" this one. The objects are equal if the other object is of the same class and if all the record components are equal. All components in this record class are compared with Objects::equals(Object,Object).
      Specified by:
      equals in class Record
      Parameters:
      o - the object with which to compare
      Returns:
      true if this object is the same as the o argument; false otherwise.

    • amount

      public BigDecimal amount()
      Returns the value of the amount record component.
      Returns:
      the value of the amount record component

    • currency

      public Currency currency()
      Returns the value of the currency record component.
      Returns:
      the value of the currency record component
